headline: How The Federal Realty (FRT) Story Is Shifting As Analysts Rework Valuation Targets
summary: Federal Realty Investment Trust’s updated analyst model now points to a fair value price target of US$115.58, compared with the prior US$114.89. This signals a slightly higher central estimate for the shares. This adjustment lines up with recent research where several firms have raised targets into the low to mid US$120s while still debating how much upside current valuations already reflect. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets fit into the broader narrative and what to...

headline: Federal Realty Investment Trust Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release Date and Conference Call Information
summary: Federal Realty Investment Trust (NYSE:FRT) will announce its first quarter 2026 earnings results before market close on Friday, May 1, 2026. The Company will host a conference call on Friday, May 1 at 9:00 AM ET.
